expectations.evidence: Dedicated Step 1 with assumptions table, optimization priorities, and explicit 'NOT optimizing for' section. Constraint summary table with all dimensions.
Recommends modular monolith with reasoning tied to 2-dev team and 3-month timeline. Includes tech stack table.
Explicitly explains why NOT microservices and why NOT serverless with specific reasoning for each.
Full backend module structure, frontend state management strategy, data entity relationships, multi-tenancy approach. Clear layer separation rules.

Covers auth (hosted provider + JWT + RBAC), error handling (consistent shape + custom classes + global handler), caching (browser + CDN + DB indexing), config (env vars + feature flags), and observability (structured logging + Sentry).
3-month build plan broken into monthly milestones, 5 ADRs, Mermaid diagram, and specific handoff notes to api-architect, database-expert, infrastructure-expert, dsa-expert.
